title: LTX Industries
description: A lime-green themed sci fi tech mod that adds machines, weapons, tools, as well as a variety resources for you to discover and gather.
body:
---

--- ## FAQ
Show F.A.Q

Q: Will this mod be ported to 1.20.1? Fabric, old Forge?
A: No, I will not downgrade to 1.20, please do not ask. I also do not wish to maintain separate codebases so NeoForge will be the only platform I work on.


Q: Where can I report problems or crashes?
A: Please be aware that I offer very limited support to mod conflicts for mods that significantly change/override the base game engine. Particularly custom player models, custom animations, shaders, etc. If the problem is not on my end, I will not fix it or make my mod compatible. Otherwise, create an issue in the GitHub repo for any LTXI/LimaCore bug or crash.

*** ## Dependencies * [LimaCore](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/limacore) (**REQUIRED**) - Central library for my mods. Check the change log for appropriate version. * [JEI](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/jei) (_Optional_) * [GuideME](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/guideme) (_Optional_) - Needed for the Guide Tablet item. * [Applied Energistics 2](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/ae2) (_Optional_) - Auto-crafting integration with Auto Fabricators *** *** ## Features at a glance * Modular upgrade system for machines and equipment * Discover our signature series equipment: Wayfinder, Serenity, Aurora, Hanabi, Stargazer, Daybreak, and Nova * **ε-Series Tools**! Convenient, rechargeable CE-powered tools. Yes, even things like shears and the brush. * Performance optimized lighting blocks in the 16 dye colors, plus some extra colors * Machines to craft and process resources * Configurable machinery * 2 new enchantments: Razor and Ammo Scavenger ***
